info.name: OAN Access to Credit (A2C)
info.description: API Contracts for the OpenAgriNet Access to Credit DPG Module. Endpoints are divided into stateless interactive APIs and background system webhooks.

request.description: Authenticates the user using standard Frappe credentials and returns a short-lived JSON Web Token (JWT) intended for frontend stateless session management.
Triggers native password recovery flow for user email address. Generates cryptographically secure token valid for 24 hours.
Sets a new password using the temporary key. Expected to be called by the Headless Frontend after a user clicks the reset link in their email.

header.description: Insert the token received from the Login API.

query.description: Single value or comma-separated list, e.g. Active,Verified. Invalid values dropped.
Single value or comma-separated list, e.g. IVR,SMS. Invalid values dropped.
Single value, comma-separated list, or stringified JSON array. Validated against A2C Credit Information.loan_type options; intersected with min/max loan amount.

Filter by assigned agent (User). Single value or comma-separated list. Use the literal 'unassigned' for leads with no agent (combinable, e.g. unassigned,agent@bank.com). Not allowlist-validated; unknown users match nothing.

request.description:
Fetches a paginated, filtered, and searchable list of A2C leads. Automatically applies multi-tenant RBAC and User Permissions at the query layer.

Multi-value filters: 'status', 'lead_source', and 'loan_type' accept a single value OR a comma-separated list (e.g. status=Active,Verified). Invalid values are silently dropped. loan_type / min_loan_amount / max_loan_amount are intersected in one A2C Credit Information subquery.

Assignee filter: 'assigned_to' filters by assigned agent (single user or comma-separated list). The literal 'unassigned' matches leads with no agent and can be combined with named users. Unknown users are not validated and simply match nothing.
Natively registers a new A2C Lead document in the system using JWT field agent context.
Returns aggregated lead counts: total count and status-wise counts. Enforces JWT session validation and native role-based permissions (RBAC).
Returns dynamic select option values for lead forms and search filters.
Attaches a new timeline comment to the specified A2C Lead.

query.description: Optional filter. Pass 'Commented' to fetch only manual agent comments.

request.description: Fetches a chronologically sorted history of A2C Lead Audit Events (timeline history) for a lead.
Retrieves and parses raw multiline call notes into a structured list of call log objects.
Schedules a visit for the lead, updates status to Verified if Active, and writes a comment to the timeline.
Retrieves the list of scheduled visits for the agent, with optional filters.
Records a new credit requirement/loan profile linked to an active discovery lead.
Retrieves the list of credit requirements recorded for the specified lead.
Updates the workflow status of a lead, logs the reason to the timeline, and enforces terminal locking.
Retrieves active users holding Development Agent or Bank Agent roles matching the fuzzy query.
Assigns a lead to an agent, updates the assignment date, and logs a timeline comment.
Updates the status of an A2C Visit Schedule (Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled, Missed).

header.description: Standard Frappe API Key and API Secret token.

request.description: Automated ingestion callback for external telecommunication IVR / missed call nodes. Bypasses JWT gateway and authenticates system-to-system via API Token.

item.name: 4.0a Get Partner Allowed Data Field IDs

pm.test('envelope status is success', function () { pm.expect(env.status).to.eql('success'); });

pm.test('envelope status is success', function () { pm.expect(env.status).to.eql('success'); });

query.description: Set to 1 to retrieve consent information alongside basic profile.

request.description: Updates basic profile details (first_name, last_name, phone_number, email, location) of the farmer linked to the lead.
Creates a new Loan Application for a Processed lead.
Updates the current step of a loan application.

query.description: Set to 1 to view inline instead of downloading.

request.description: Downloads or streams the content of an uploaded private supporting document.
Deletes a supporting document associated with a loan application.
Updates the status of a loan application (Approved or Rejected).

query.description: Single value or comma-separated list, e.g. Processing,Approved. Validated against {Draft, Processing, Approved, Rejected}; invalid values dropped.
JSON array format is recommended to prevent comma-delimiter issues. Free-text field, not allowlist-validated.

Filter by assigned Loan Officer (User). Single value or comma-separated list. Use the literal 'unassigned' for loans with no officer (combinable, e.g. unassigned,officer@bank.com). Not allowlist-validated; unknown users match nothing.

variable.value: Met with farmer at the cooperative office. Recommended for the Fertilizer 2026 campaign.
Lead meets criteria and is ready to be processed further.
